name: Milky Way Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the sugar with one egg at a time, mixing well after each addition.
2. Add the remaining eggs and stir thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the evaporated milk, stirring constantly to avoid bubbles.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring continuously until the mixture thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped Milky Way bars, vanilla extract, and condensed milk.
6. Pour the mixture into a 1-gallon freezer-safe container, filling it to within 2 inches of the top with milk.
7. Freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
